summary: Frontend testing completed for TeacherHubPro homepage v3 update. All features tested successfully: multi-language support (English/Spanish), logo headers on all pages, and three new feature sections with images.
context_for_next_testing_agent: TeacherHubPro homepage v3 update tested successfully. All multi-language features working, all pages have logo headers, and three new feature sections (Play to Learn, Educational Games, Adaptive Learning) display correctly with images.

landing_page_english.details: Hero headline 'Save 5+ Hours Every Week on Planning, Grading, and Classroom Admin' displays correctly

landing_page_spanish.details: Hero headline 'Ahorra 5+ Horas Cada Semana en Planificación, Calificaciones y Administración' displays correctly

language_selector.details: Language selector switches between English and Spanish correctly

play_to_learn_section.details: Section displays with image and Spanish content ('Jugar para Aprender')

educational_games_section.details: Section displays with image and Spanish content ('Juegos Educativos')

adaptive_learning_section.details: Section displays with image and Spanish content ('Aprendizaje Adaptativo')

auth_page_header.details: TeacherHubPro logo and name present in header, Spanish translations working

help_page_header.details: TeacherHubPro logo and name present in header

privacy_policy_page_header.details: TeacherHubPro logo and name present in header

terms_of_use_page_header.details: TeacherHubPro logo and name present in header
